title: Tens of thousands just got evacuated from one of Europe's top tourist spots
text:
Tens of thousands of people are being evacuated from one of Europe's most popular tourist coastlines right now.

Record breaking heat and months without rain have turned parts of southern France into a tinderbox, and this week the flames finally reached campsites and hotel strips packed with summer travelers.

Firefighters say the drought driving it is one of the worst the region has recorded in decades, and the fire is still not contained.
highlights: Tens of thousands of people are being evacuated
turned parts of southern France into a tinderbox
one of the worst the region has recorded in decades
